hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】美联储理事米兰递交辞呈，支持沃什出任新任主席；【CRYPTO】随着参议院银行业委员会通过《澄清法案》，XRP、DOGE 飙升 5%，比特币突破 81,000 美元；【FINANCE】凯文·沃什 (Kevin Warsh) 获得参议院批准，担任下一任美联储主席。

items.title: Fed Governor Miran submits resignation, throws support behind Warsh as new chair
items.summary: Miran served as a contrarian voice on the rate-setting Federal Open Market Committee.
items.title_zh: 美联储理事米兰递交辞呈，支持沃什出任新任主席
items.summary_zh: 米兰在制定利率的联邦公开市场委员会中担任逆向声音。

items.title: XRP, DOGE surge 5%, bitcoin above $81,000 as Clarity Act clears Senate banking panel
items.summary: Crypto majors bid higher Friday after the Digital Asset Market Clarity Act cleared the Senate Banking Committee in a 15-9 bipartisan vote, with XRP and dogecoin leading the cohort even as broader risk assets sold off on Trump's comments that the US does not need to reopen the Str
items.title_zh: 随着参议院银行业委员会通过《澄清法案》，XRP、DOGE 飙升 5%，比特币突破 81,000 美元
items.summary_zh: 周五，《数字资产市场清晰度法案》以 15 比 9 的两党投票通过了参议院银行委员会，其中 XRP 和狗狗币领先，尽管特朗普表示美国不需要重新开放战略，导致更广泛的风险资产遭到抛售。

items.title: Kevin Warsh wins Senate confirmation as the next Federal Reserve chair
items.summary: In the most divisive vote ever for a Fed chair, Warsh, 56, won confirmation to take over for Jerome Powell.
items.title_zh: 凯文·沃什 (Kevin Warsh) 获得参议院批准，担任下一任美联储主席
items.summary_zh: 在有史以来最具争议性的美联储主席投票中，56 岁的沃什获得确认接替杰罗姆·鲍威尔 (Jerome Powell)。

items.title: Enter the Killer Robots: The Ukrainian Forging the Future of Warfare
items.summary: Mykhailo Fedorov, Ukraine’s 35-year-old defense minister, sees futuristic military technology as crucial to his country’s survival.
items.title_zh: 输入杀手机器人：乌克兰人打造战争的未来
items.summary_zh: 35 岁的乌克兰国防部长米哈伊洛·费多罗夫 (Mykhailo Fedorov) 认为未来军事技术对其国家的生存至关重要。

items.title: Forward Industries posts over 300% revenue growth but wider quarterly net loss amid SOL markdowns
items.summary: The Solana treasury firm generated $13 million in revenue for the quarter ended March 31, up 319% year over year.
items.title_zh: Forward Industries 收入增长超过 300%，但由于 SOL 降价，季度净亏损扩大
items.summary_zh: Solana 财务公司截至 3 月 31 日的季度收入为 1300 万美元，同比增长 319%。

items.title: Bit Digital reports 14% revenue drop in Q1, driven by lower ETH staking rewards
items.summary: Bit Digital generated $27.9 million in total revenue in the first quarter of this year, down 13.6% from Q4 2025.
items.title_zh: Bit Digital 报告称，由于 ETH 质押奖励下降，第一季度收入下降 14%
items.summary_zh: Bit Digital 今年第一季度总收入为 2790 万美元，比 2025 年第四季度下降 13.6%。

items.title: Sea's View on the Future of Agentic Software Development with Codex
items.summary: Sea Limited's CPO explains why the company is deploying Codex across engineering teams to accelerate AI-native software development in Asia.
items.title_zh: Sea 对 Codex 代理软件开发未来的看法
items.summary_zh: Sea Limited 的 CPO 解释了该公司为何在工程团队中部署 Codex 以加速亚洲 AI 原生软件的开发。

items.title: Strategy’s STRC stock logs record $1.5 billion trading volume, funds 11,707 bitcoin purchase
items.summary: Heavy trading volume ahead of the ex-dividend date pushed STRC to its busiest session on record.
items.title_zh: Strategy 的 STRC 股票交易量创纪录的 15 亿美元，资金购买了 11,707 枚比特币
items.summary_zh: 除息日之前的大量交易将 STRC 推至有记录以来最繁忙的时段。

items.title: CLARITY will strengthen dollar stablecoins, but Asia wins on yield: HashKey Research
items.summary: HashKey says U.S. regulatory clarity may unlock institutional adoption of crypto and reinforce USD stablecoins globally, though stricter yield rules could push capital toward Asian markets offering higher returns.
items.title_zh: CLARITY 将增强美元稳定币，但亚洲在收益率上获胜：HashKey Research
items.summary_zh: HashKey 表示，美国监管的明确性可能会促进机构对加密货币的采用，并在全球范围内加强美元稳定币，尽管更严格的收益率规则可能会推动资本流向提供更高回报的亚洲市场。

items.title: Helping ChatGPT better recognize context in sensitive conversations
items.summary: Learn how new ChatGPT safety updates improve context awareness in sensitive conversations, helping detect risk over time and respond more safely.
items.title_zh: 帮助 ChatGPT 更好地识别敏感对话中的上下文
items.summary_zh: 了解新的 ChatGPT 安全更新如何提高敏感对话中的上下文感知，帮助随着时间的推移检测风险并更安全地做出响应。

items.title: Xi warns Trump: Mishandling Taiwan will put U.S.-China relationship in 'great jeopardy'
items.summary: President Donald Trump met Chinese President Xi Jinping in Beijing on Thursday morning for the start of a high-stakes summit that runs through Friday.
items.title_zh: 习近平警告特朗普：对台湾处理不当将使美中关系陷入“巨大危险”
items.summary_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普总统周四上午在北京会见了中国国家主席习近平，开始了持续到周五的高风险峰会。

items.title: Trump in China: Traders predict a tariff truce extension and Boeing aircraft purchases
items.summary: Traders also think it is likely that the president will talk about Iran, despite his comments that the U.S. doesn't need China's help in resolving the war.
items.title_zh: 特朗普在中国：交易员预测关税休战将延长并购买波音飞机
items.summary_zh: 交易员还认为，总统很可能会谈论伊朗问题，尽管他表示美国不需要中国帮助解决战争。

items.title: Inside the Congolese Hotel Where Trump Deported 15 U.S. Migrants
items.summary: They were shackled and sent to Kinshasa by the Trump administration. Now they face a dangerous choice: Go back to Latin America or stay in Africa.
items.title_zh: 特朗普驱逐 15 名美国移民的刚果酒店内部
items.summary_zh: 他们被特朗普政府戴上脚镣并送往金沙萨。现在他们面临一个危险的选择：返回拉丁美洲还是留在非洲。

items.title: The U.S. stock market is getting close to dot-com bubble peak valuations
items.summary: The Shiller cyclically adjusted price-to-earnings ratio for U.S. stocks is nearing the 1999 peak seen during the dot-com bubble.
items.title_zh: 美国股市正接近互联网泡沫估值峰值
items.summary_zh: 美国股票的席勒周期调整市盈率已接近 1999 年互联网泡沫时期的峰值。

items.title: Lawyer behind Arbitrum crypto seizure fight now targets Tether for $344 million
items.summary: Charles Gerstein wants a federal judge to order Tether to transfer OFAC-frozen USDT tied to Iran’s Revolutionary Guard to victims holding unpaid terrorism judgments
items.title_zh: Arbitrum 加密货币扣押案背后的律师现在瞄准 Tether 3.44 亿美元
items.summary_zh: Charles Gerstein 希望联邦法官命令 Tether 将 OFAC 冻结的与伊朗革命卫队相关的 USDT 转移给持有未付恐怖主义判决书的受害者

items.title: Hana Bank acquires $670 million stake in Upbit parent Dunamu
items.summary: The acquisition of 2.28 million shares will give Hana Bank a 6.55% stake in Dunamu, making it the fourth-largest shareholder.
items.title_zh: 韩亚银行 (Hana Bank) 以 6.7 亿美元收购 Upbit 母公司 Dunamu 的股份
items.summary_zh: 此次收购228万股将使韩亚银行持有Dunamu 6.55%的股份，成为第四大股东。

items.title: Trump’s latest disclosure shows Coinbase, Strategy, MARA purchases in Q1
items.summary: Among the Coinbase-related purchases, the largest transaction was a Feb. 10 purchase valued between $100,001 and $250,000.

items.title: What Parameter Golf taught us about AI-assisted research
items.summary: Parameter Golf brought together 1,000+ participants and 2,000+ submissions to explore AI-assisted machine learning research, coding agents, quantization, and novel model design under strict constraints.

items.title: How ChatGPT adoption broadened in early 2026
items.summary: ChatGPT adoption surged in Q1 2026, with fastest growth among users over 35 and more balanced gender usage, signaling broader mainstream AI adoption.

items.summary_zh: ChatGPT 的采用率在 2026 年第一季度激增，其中 35 岁以上的用户增长最快，性别使用更加平衡，这表明主流 AI 的采用更加广泛。

items.summary: Assistant Professor Gabriele Farina mines the foundations of decision-making in complex multi-agent scenarios.

items.title: Some short sellers are seeing opportunity in this tech mania. How they're spotting fake AI stocks

items.title: Nvidia’s Future in China Remains Unclear After Trump-Xi Summit

items.title: Cardano whales now hold 67% of ADA supply in highest share since 2020
items.summary: Wallets holding at least one million ADA now control 25.09 billion tokens, the highest share since July 2020, even as Cardano's TVL has bled to $137 million from a December 2024 peak of $686 million, per Santiment and DefiLlama data.
items.title_zh: 卡尔达诺鲸鱼目前持有 ADA 供应量的 67%，为 2020 年以来的最高份额
items.summary_zh: 根据 Santiment 和 DefiLlama 的数据，持有至少 100 万个 ADA 的钱包现在控制着 250.9 亿个代币，这是自 2020 年 7 月以来的最高份额，尽管根据 Santiment 和 DefiLlama 的数据，Cardano 的 TVL 已从 2024 年 12 月的峰值 6.86 亿美元减少至 1.37 亿美元。

items.title: Here is why Wall Street is racing to tokenize the entire stock market
